meaning: n.公共汽车,公共马车,精选集adj.综合性的,混合的,(包括)多项的
examples: The money was part of an omnibus spending bill approved by Congress.
Can you persuade the man on the Clapham omnibus that it is useful?
A gentleman and a lady were talking in an omnibus.
Can you give me a couple more examples of particular issues with the omnibus?
But it also kept Congress from sweeping all the spending bills into an omnibus.
